data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of promoting customers from the waitlist when capacity opens, as outlined in the linked use case. However, the evidence does not provide any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or working as intended. The lack of evidence supporting the promotion mechanism leads to a clear gap in the requirement satisfaction.
gaps: Promotion from waitlist when capacity opens is not explicitly validated or confirmed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
